seo.title: Heritage | Big Three Games
seo.description: Discover Heritage, a strategic auto-battler roguelike from Big Three Games where each run helps you to build a lasting legacy.

hero.title: Heritage
hero.summary: Build your legacy across decades, survive battles, and grow stronger through the Hall of the Ancestors.

cta.title: Wishlist Heritage and Follow Development
cta.body: Track updates, try the demo, and help shape balance through community feedback.
